nasb.text: These also cast lots just as their relatives the sons of Aaron in the presence of David the king, Zadok, Ahimelech, and the heads of the fathers’ households of the priests and of the Levites—the head of fathers’ households as well as those of his younger brother.

esv.text: These also, the head of each father’s house and his younger brother alike, cast lots, just as their brothers the sons of Aaron, in the presence of King David, Zadok, Ahimelech, and the heads of fathers’ houses of the priests and of the Levites.

cnv.text: 他們在大衛王、撒督、亞希米勒，以及祭司和利未人的家族首領面前也抽了籤，好像他們的親族亞倫的子孫一樣；各家族首領和他們年幼的兄弟都一樣抽了籤。

ccb.text: 他们也在大卫王、撒督、亚希米勒、众祭司和利未人的族长面前抽签，不分长幼，正如他们的亲族亚伦的后代所做的一样。
